start_keyframe.description: Ce que voit le personnage au début
start_keyframe.midground: Un journal posé sur la table avec des titres visibles

end_keyframe.description: Ce que voit le personnage à la fin
end_keyframe.change: Le journal est légèrement déplacé, exposant une tasse de café partiellement visible

action: Un léger mouvement de la main déplaçant le journal

start_keyframe.description: Julien stands in a modern, brightly lit office space with a round face, prominent cheekbones, and a strong jawline. He has a smiling expression with short, wavy brown hair. His skin tone is #f5d3b1. He is wearing a medium gray blazer (#5C5C5C) with a light green shirt (#AADF36) underneath, and no visible accessories. Julien's gaze is directed away to the left, indicating engagement with Character B, who is seen from the back, slightly blurred.
start_keyframe.location: The space is modern and luminous, with a color palette of #5C5C5C, #AADF36, #FF5733, and #00E6E6.
start_keyframe.pose: Julien is standing with arms crossed, conveying focus and engagement.
start_keyframe.outfit: Medium gray blazer, light green shirt, no accessories.
start_keyframe.character_b_position: Character B is standing to the right of Julien, facing away, slightly blurred.

end_keyframe.description: Julien has shifted his pose, now gesturing with one hand towards Character B, who remains slightly blurred and facing away.
end_keyframe.pose: Julien's right hand is raised in a gesture of explanation or discussion.
end_keyframe.character_b_position: Character B is in the same position, facing away, slightly blurred.

action: Julien raises his right hand to gesture towards Character B.

start_keyframe.description: Julien is standing confidently in the elegant loft, holding a presentation clicker in his right hand.
start_keyframe.location: The loft is decorated with modern furniture and splashes of color from the palette: #6A6A6A, #B5E041, #FF5733, #29E0E0.
start_keyframe.pose: Standing with feet shoulder-width apart, right hand holding the clicker at waist level.
start_keyframe.expression: Slight smile with an expression of pride.
start_keyframe.outfit: A tailored suit in #6A6A6A with a shirt in #B5E041 and no visible accessories.
start_keyframe.character_b_position: Standing to the left, slightly behind Julien, blurred silhouette.

end_keyframe.description: Julien is pointing towards a projection screen with the clicker in his right hand.
end_keyframe.pose: Right arm extended, pointing towards the screen.
end_keyframe.expression: Confident smile, eyes focused on the screen.
end_keyframe.character_b_position: Standing to the left, slightly behind Julien, blurred silhouette.

action: Julien raises his right arm to point at the screen.

start_keyframe.description: Julien stands on the rooftop, overlooking the cityscape. The sky is painted with a warm sunset hue, casting long shadows over the urban landscape.
start_keyframe.location: Rooftop terrace with a view of the city, colors of the scene include #6B6B6B from the buildings, #A5D144 from distant trees, and #FF5733 from the sunset.
start_keyframe.pose: Standing with arms relaxed at his sides, feet shoulder-width apart.
start_keyframe.expression: A subtle, content smile showing satisfaction.
start_keyframe.outfit: Casual light grey jacket over a #00E0E8 shirt, dark pants.
start_keyframe.character_b_position: Slightly to the left, blurred silhouette, looking at the city.

end_keyframe.description: Julien raises his right arm, pointing towards the horizon with a sense of achievement.
end_keyframe.pose: Right arm raised, pointing towards the horizon.
end_keyframe.character_b_position: Same position as start, slightly more turned to follow Julien's gesture.

action: Julien raises his right arm, pointing towards the horizon.
